children.heading: Liability
children.label: a Liability
children.text: Subject to and this section, nothing in this subchapter or an Indian trust asset management plan approved under shall independently diminish, increase, create, or otherwise affect the liability of the United States or an Indian tribe participating in the project for any loss resulting from the management of an Indian trust asset under an Indian trust asset management plan.section 5614 of this titlesection 5613 of this title

children.heading: Deviation from standard practices
children.label: b Deviation from standard practices
children.text: The United States shall not be liable to any party (including any Indian tribe) for any term of, or any loss resulting from the terms of, an Indian trust asset management plan that provides for management of a trust asset at a less-stringent standard than the Secretary would otherwise require or adhere to in absence of an Indian trust asset management plan.

children.heading: Effect of termination of plan
children.label: c Effect of termination of plan
children.text: Subsection (b) applies to losses resulting from a transaction or activity described in that subsection even if the Indian trust asset management plan is terminated under or rescinded under .section 5613(d) of this titlesection 5614(h) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in sections 5613 and 5614 of this title and subsection (e), nothing in this subchapter amends or otherwise affects the application of any treaty, statute, regulation, or Executive order that is applicable to Indian trust assets or the management or administration of Indian trust assets.

children.heading: Indian Self-Determination Act
children.label: 2 Indian Self-Determination Act
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter limits or otherwise affects the authority of an Indian tribe, including an Indian tribe participating in the project, to enter into and carry out a contract, compact, or other agreement under the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act ( et seq.) (including regulations).25 U.S.C. 4501See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Separate approval
children.label: e Separate approval
children.text: An Indian tribe may submit to the Secretary tribal regulations described in governing forest land management activities for review and approval under this subchapter if the Indian tribe does not submit or intend to submit an Indian trust asset management plan.section 5614(b) of this title

children.heading: Trust responsibility
children.label: f Trust responsibility
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter enhances, diminishes, or otherwise affects the trust responsibility of the United States to Indian tribes or individual Indians.
